remoteScopes.label: Product implementation
remoteScopes.description: Code and test changes inside the OMHT app surface.
planSteps: Read the relevant product code, tests, and existing patterns before editing.
Implement the smallest scoped change that satisfies the request.
Add or update focused tests when behavior changes.
Run the configured verification command and report changed files plus residual risk.
successCriteria: The requested behavior is implemented inside the declared target scope.
Configured verification passes or the blocker is reported clearly.

remoteScopes.label: Planning/report document
remoteScopes.description: Documentation, planning, prompt, or report work without app code changes.
planSteps: Read the relevant planning and reference documents before writing.
Create or update only the requested planning/report artifact.
Keep decisions, assumptions, and next actions explicit.
Run the configured verification command if repository tooling requires it.
successCriteria: The requested planning/report artifact is complete and easy to act on.
No app code or forbidden files are changed.
Configured verification passes or the blocker is reported clearly.
